accepted.reason: Self-contained loop-based primality kernel with clear Cython speedup characteristics.
Compact finite-difference stencil over arrays; strong numeric kernel candidate.
Grid mirror/rotate primitives are deterministic nested-loop kernels suited to optimization tasks.
Structured parsing and attribute tokenization logic is reusable and trace-compatible.

CPython/threading internals and descriptor machinery are framework-specific, not kernel-focused.
Image pipeline includes boundary-sensitive indexing and broader algorithm context; deferred for now.
Highly specialized physics code with project-specific C structs/types and external dependencies.
Cython behavior regression test, not a performance-oriented optimization kernel.
Language semantics test case rather than numerically meaningful kernel content.
